nasb.text: Edom shall be a possession, Seir, its enemies, also will be a possession, While Israel performs valiantly.

esv.text: Edom shall be dispossessed; Seir also, his enemies, shall be dispossessed. Israel is doing valiantly.

cnv.text: 他必得以東作產業， 又得仇敵之地西珥作產業； 只有以色列人成為強壯。

ccb.text: 他必征服以东， 占领敌疆西珥， 以色列必勇往直前。
